summary: TWO_COLUMN Chebyshev inequality P(|X-μ|≥kσ)≤1/k². LEFT axes with BLUE N(0, 1) density + YELLOW always_redraw tail region |X|≥k + ORANGE dashed ±k boundaries. ValueTracker k_tr sweeps 1→5. RIGHT has live actual tail (via scipy.stats.norm.sf), Chebyshev bound 1/k², gap — actual always below bound.
